description: Standard scVelo preprocessing: scv.pp.filter_and_normalize, then sc.pp.neighbors (only if not already present), then scv.pp.moments to compute the first- and second-order moments velocity estimation needs. Writes a moments-ready .h5ad.
rules: read-only input — writes a new preprocessed.h5ad under record_store
input must have layers['spliced'] and layers['unspliced']
neighbors graph is computed only when 'neighbors' is absent from adata.uns
defaults follow the upstream skill: min_shared_counts=20, n_top_genes=2000, n_neighbors=30, n_pcs=30
usage: Set INPUT (.h5ad with spliced/unspliced). Optional: MIN_SHARED_COUNTS, N_TOP_GENES, N_NEIGHBORS, N_PCS. Output: preprocessed.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scvelo (and scanpy) installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder preprocessed.h5ad and still passes.
